description: You are a Cloud FinOps Analyst auditing the data transfer and storage write costs for a specific EC2 instance. Create a Graphite dashboard named 'Cumulative FinOps Audit' that displays the running total of data consumed over time, scaled to Megabytes (MB). The dashboard must include a graph titled 'Total Network Ingress' showing the cumulative sum (integral) of servers.ec2_instance_1.network.bytes_in scaled to MB (0.000001) with the legend 'Network MB'. It must also include a graph titled 'Total Disk Writes' showing the cumulative sum (integral) of servers.ec2_instance_1.disk.write_bytes scaled to MB (0.000001) with the legend 'Disk MB'. Finally, include a graph titled 'Combined I/O Volume' showing the combined sum (sumSeries) of both metrics as a cumulative total (integral) scaled to MB (0.000001) with the legend 'Total I/O MB'. Save the dashboard ensuring all names, titles, and aliases match the requirements exactly.
